resourceTemplates.name: ned-activity-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Activity by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single activity resource by its activity identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-activities-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Activities list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the activity collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.title: NED Authorisation by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single authorisation resource by its authorisation identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-authorisations-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Authorisations list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the authorisation collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-classifications-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Classifications list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the classification collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-granularity-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Granularity by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single granularity resource by its granularity identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-granularities-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Granularities list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the granularity collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-granularity-time-zone-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Granularity time zone by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single granularity time zone resource by its identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-granularity-time-zones-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Granularity time zones list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the granularity time zone collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-point-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Point by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single point resource by its point identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-points-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Points list with filters
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the point collection with complete documented query support: page, itemsPerPage, id, repeated id[], identifier, name, parentpoints, repeated parentpoints[], childpoints, repeated childpoints[], validfrom, repeated validfrom[], and the validfrom before/strictly_before/after/strictly_after range filters.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-type-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Type by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single type resource by its type identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-types-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Types list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the type collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-user-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED User by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single user resource by its user identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-users-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Users list
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the user collection with explicit pagination controls. Supports page and itemsPerPage.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-utilization-by-id
resourceTemplates.title: NED Utilization by id
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single utilization resource by its utilization identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-utilizations-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Utilizations list with filters
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the utilization collection with complete documented query support: page, itemsPerPage, id, repeated id[], point, repeated point[], type, repeated type[], granularity, repeated granularity[], granularitytimezone, repeated granularitytimezone[], classification, repeated classification[], activity, repeated activity[], validfrom before/strictly_before/after/strictly_after range filters, and order[validfrom] with asc or desc.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-widget-by-hash
resourceTemplates.title: NED Widget by hash
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves a single widget resource by its widget hash identifier.

resourceTemplates.name: ned-widgets-list
resourceTemplates.title: NED Widgets list with filters
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieves the widget collection with complete documented GET query support: page, itemsPerPage, hash, repeated hash[], owner, repeated owner[], validfrom before/strictly_before/after/strictly_after range filters, and order[validfrom] with asc or desc.
